meta.title: Can Iran Inspect Itself?: IAEA Side Agreements and the Iran Nuclear Deal
meta.description: David Albright, Omri Ceren, Michael Doran, and Lee Smith discuss separate arrangements between Iran and IAEA, the JCPOA, and nuclear nonproliferation.
